name: io.github.weiseer/llm-oracle
description: Continuously-updated catalog of LLM provider availability and pricing. Tools: list_models, get_model, find_cheapest, compare_models, check_availability. Self-contained (bundled catalog) with optional fresh-data fetch from oracle.weiseer.com.

environment_variables.name: LLM_ORACLE_URL
environment_variables.description: override the remote catalog URL (default: https://oracle.weiseer.com/catalog.json)

environment_variables.name: LLM_ORACLE_LOCAL_ONLY
environment_variables.description: set to any value to skip remote fetch and use bundled catalog only
